title: Wrong result produced when left joining information_schema tables
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100), created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INT PRIMARY KEY, user_id INT, amount DECIMAL(10, 2), FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(id));
SELECT u.name, o.amount FROM users u LEFT JOIN orders o ON u.id = o.user_id WHERE o.amount IS NULL;
key_bug_features: Left joining information_schema tables produces wrong results
